journal_entry.rationale: When services are delivered against a previously received customer deposit, the liability (Unearned Revenue or Customer Deposits) is reduced (debited) and revenue is recognized (credited). The deposit was recorded as cash debit / liability credit when received; now the liability is extinguished and revenue is earned. No tax is applicable on this entry because the tax was already handled when the deposit was originally received.

output.reason: The customer deposit (unearned revenue liability) is being converted to earned revenue as the service is delivered. Debit: Liability decrease (unearned revenue). Credit: Revenue increase (service revenue earned).
